question: Is there any other platform, other than the MyJio app, from where I can activate the Netflix subscription under JioFiber?
answer: Yes, you can activate the Netflix subscription by logging on to Jio.com with your JioFiber Number.

question: Will the Samsung Galaxy S10 Jio Double Benefit Offer 2019 offer be available, if I purchase Samsung Galaxy S10+ or Galaxy S10 or Galaxy S10e device from other stores or ecommerce sites?
answer: Yes, “Samsung Galaxy S10 – Jio Double Benefit Offer – 2019” is available for mobile device, purchased in India during the offer period.

question: If I don’t have a Netflix account, can I still avail the Netflix offer with JioFiber plans?
answer: Yes, just sign up as a new Netflix user, recharge your JioHome with a bundled JioFiber plan, including the Netflix subscription, and start streaming blockbuster movies, shows, live sports, and more, nonstop.

question: What is the process of watching Netflix content after activating a JioFiber plan?
answer: Once your JioFiber connection is active on eligible plans, follow these three simple steps to activate the Netflix subscription: a) Within minutes of your JioFiber connection getting activated, you will get an SMS message from Jio with a link to download the MyJio app b) Install the MyJio app on your mobile, log in with your Registered Mobile Number and tap on the ‘Activate Now’ option on the Netflix banner on the app’s homepage c) Log in to Netflix with an existing Netflix account or by creating a new one and with that, the Netflix subscription will be instantly activated

question: How will I get to know if the cashback voucher, under the Jio Asus Zenfone Data Offer , has been credited to my account? And where can I view the voucher?
answer: You will be notified through appropriate channel when the cashback vouchers have been credited to your account. You can view the cashback vouchers under the “My Vouchers” section in MyJio app.

question: How can I watch movies and TV shows on Netflix with a bundled JioFiber plan?
answer: With your JioFiber bundled plan , you can stream Netflix on your existing or new account. Simply, open the Netflix app on your Jio Set Top Box, log in, and start watching instantly on your mobile, tablet, laptop, or any other device.

question: Are we supposed to complete the sign-up process on Netflix to avail of the JioFiber plan in every bill cycle?
answer: Once logged in, you do not need to log in again and again, to enjoy Netflix as long as you’re on an active eligible JioFiber plan. However, in case you downgrade to a non-eligible plan or terminate your JioFiber connection, Netflix benefits availed under this offer may cease to exist.

question: How will I know the status of the Netflix Offer whether availed or not?
answer: The status of your Netflix offer can be checked on MyJio app under ‘My Subscriptions'.

question: How long is my Netflix subscription via JioFiber valid? Will I be charged anything extra for subscribing to Netflix?
answer: Netflix subscription is valid till the validity of the bundled recharge plan. You will not be charged anything extra for the subscription. However, you can opt to upgrade your Netflix plan. In this case, the differential subscription amount needs to be paid at the time of the upgrade.

question: What is the Netflix Offer with JioFiber?
answer: With select JioFiber bundled plans, you get a Netflix subscription at no extra cost. This means your Netflix plan is included in your monthly JioFiber bill, and you don’t have to pay separately to watch Netflix. Once activated, you can enjoy unlimited access to: Hollywood and Bollywood movies Indian regional films and web series Popular TV shows from India and around the world Netflix Originals across genres Kids content, documentaries, stand-up specials, and more You can watch Netflix anytime on your mobile, smart TV, laptop, or through the Jio Set Top Box using your JioFiber connection. Your Netflix entitlement depends on the JioFiber plan you choose. Higher-value bundled plans may offer upgraded Netflix tiers, giving you better video quality and more simultaneous screens. To activate Netflix, simply go to the MyJio app → My Plans and look for the Netflix activation banner once your eligible plan is active.

question: I already have a personal Netflix subscription with a higher plan than the one included with my JioHome plan. How can I continue using it?
answer: If you already have an active personal Netflix subscription (such as Premium) that is higher than the Netflix plan included with your JioHome plan, you can continue using your existing subscription without losing any benefits. When you open the Netflix app on your Jio Set Top Box for the first time, you will see a message: “Great News! You now have Netflix with Jio.” Select “Get Started” and sign in using your existing Netflix email ID and password. After successful login, Netflix will automatically check your account. If it detects that your current Netflix plan is higher than the plan included with JioHome, you will be guided with the following options: Continue with your existing higher Netflix plan: Select “Yes, Start Watching.” You will continue to enjoy all features of your current Netflix plan. Any additional charges will be added to your Jio bill, and your existing payment method (credit or debit card) will no longer be charged. Change your Netflix plan: Select “Plan Options” and choose the Netflix plan you prefer and your earlier payment method (credit/debit card) will stop being charged.

question: I have an active JioFiber plan, but the Netflix activation message is not showing in the MyJio app. What should I do?
answer: If your Netflix activation message isn’t appearing in the MyJio app app despite an active JioFiber plan, it usually means the app needs to be refreshed or the plan benefits haven’t synced yet. You can fix this with a few quick checks: Update the MyJio app: Make sure you are using the latest version of the MyJio app from the Google Play Store or Apple App Store. Older versions may not show updated plan benefits. Close and reopen the app: After updating, force-close MyJio and reopen it so your plan details refresh properly.. Check if your JioFiber plan includes Netflix: Only eligible JioFiber bundled plans show the Netflix activation banner. You can confirm your plan benefits in the My Plan section.. Restart your JioFiber router: A quick reboot helps sync your service benefits with the app.. If the activation message still doesn’t appear, you can contact the Jio Contact Centre for support. The team can check your plan status, refresh your OTT benefits, and help trigger the Netflix activation message on your account.

question: Is the Netflix offer available to all JioFiber users?
answer: No, a Netflix subscription is bundled with select JioFiber recharge plans only. You can explore the list of eligible JioFiber OTT plans compare and go for the one that best fits your streaming needs.

question: What can I watch on Netflix after taking this Offer?
answer: Netflix has an extensive global and local content library featuring award-winning Netflix originals, feature films, documentaries, TV shows, and more. The more you watch, the better Netflix gets at recommending TV shows and movies you will love. You can play, pause, and resume watching without ads or commitments. Plus, you can download your favourite shows to your iOS or Android mobile device. With downloads, you can watch while you're on the go and without an internet connection .

question: I have forgotten my Netflix Login ID. What to do?
answer: You need to log in to Jio.com or open the MyJio app, then go to subscriptions and recover your Netflix Login ID by tapping on “Recover Username”.

question: What is the benefit of buying L7 smartphone under "TCL JioExclusive Offer"?
answer: When you decide to buy L7 smartphone under this Offer, you will be offered the device at an affordable price. Thus, your new device comes at a price of Rs. 4,999 which is much lower than its usual market price of Rs. 6,999. For this specifications, it’s the cheapest smartphone among major brands.

question: I am a Jio Postpaid/Jio Prepaid/JioFi user. Will I get the Netflix Offer?
answer: The JioFiber Netflix Offer is only valid for an eligible JioFiber plan. Just check your Jio Postpaid/Jio Prepaid/JioFi benefits on the MyJio app.

question: How do I activate Netflix that comes bundled with my JioFiber plan?
answer: If your JioFiber plan includes a Netflix subscription, you can activate it in just a few steps. You can use MyJio, Jio.com, or your Jio Set Top Box (STB) to start using Netflix on your JioFiber connection. Steps to activate Netflix through MyJio or Jio.com (Recommended) Open the MyJio app or visit Jio.com and log in to your JioFiber account. On the top of the home page, look for the Netflix 'Activate Now' banner. Tap or click 'Activate Now'. You will be redirected to Netflix.com. Follow the on-screen instructions to link your existing Netflix account or create a new Netflix account if you don’t have one. Once linked, your Netflix subscription will be activated under your JioFiber plan, and billing will be managed by Jio. Steps to activate Netflix through the Jio Set Top Box Launch the Netflix app on your TV screen from your Jio Set Top Box. Follow the on-screen instructions to link your existing Netflix account or create a new Netflix account if you don’t have one. Once completed, your Netflix service will be activated through your JioFiber plan benefits. Note: If you already have a Netflix account logged in on the STB, you may need to sign out first before starting the activation process. Good to know: Your Netflix plan depends on the JioFiber plan you have subscribed to. After activation, your Netflix billing is handled by JioFiber, so you won’t be charged separately by Netflix. If you upgrade your JioFiber plan, your Netflix plan benefits may also be upgraded automatically (depending on eligibility). You can enjoy Netflix across devices like TV, mobile, tablet, or laptop, as long as your JioFiber plan includes Netflix access. For any login or linking issues, you can use the Run Diagnostics feature on MyJio or raise a support request.

question: How can I opt out of "TCL JioExclusive Offer"?

answer: Additional Data pack have 30 days validity and maximum 10 times. Un-used data will be forfeited after validity expiry.

answer: Yes, the buyer will have to use an active Jio SIM in any one of the SIM slots.

answer: You need to have a Jio SIM and recharge with any Jio prepaid smartphone plan or subscribe to any Jio postpaid plan.

question: What if my Jio number doesn t have a valid plan on the device bought under "TCL JioExclusive Offer"?
answer: You will get recharge reminders from Jio to recharge your Jio number on time. If you do not have valid recharge on your Jio SIM, your device will only be able to make emergency calls and Wi-Fi pairing only to get the device usable again from server. You will be able to use full features of the smartphone when you perform a valid recharge on your Jio SIM.

question: How do I Claim the Jio Nokia C Series 2023 Offer?
answer: Additional 10 GB data will be provided under the Offer, can be applied by the Eligible Subscriber. Eligible Subscribers would also get also get coupons from Ixigo, Easydiner.in and ET Prime in MyJio app under “My Coupons” section.

question: Can I avail any other offer along with the Jio Nokia C Series 2023 Offer?
answer: No, two or more offers cannot be clubbed together.

question: Will my locked L7 smartphone purchase under "TCL JioExclusive Offer" work outside India, on voice, SMs, Wi-Fi and data?

question: How long does my JioTV Premium Plan last? Do I need to pay extra for the 11 OTT apps included in the subscription?
answer: Your JioTV Premium Plan is valid for the entire duration of the recharge, and you won't be charged anything extra for accessing the content from the 11 included OTT apps during this time.

question: Which OTTs are available on the JioTV Premium Plan?
answer: With JioTV Premium Plan, you get access to a premium lineup of 11 top-notch OTT platforms, across three categories: National: Zee5, Sony LIV and FanCode International:Lionsgate and Discovery+ Regional: SunNXT, Hoichoi, Kanchha Lannka, Planet Marathi and Chaupal In other words, you enjoy a diverse mix of national, international, and regional entertainment in one plan.

question: Can I watch content from all OTT platforms in the JioTV Premium Plan within a single app?
answer: Yes, content from most of the OTT apps offered in the JioTV Premium Plan can be accessed directly through the 'Premium' section (crown icon) of the JioTV app.

question: After recharging and activating the JioTV Premium Plan, can I watch content on a large TV screen?
answer: No, your JioTV Premium Plan provides access to the mobile-only version of OTT subscriptions. Additionally, the content will work only on one mobile screen at a time.

question: What are the benefits of JioTV Premium Plan recharges?
answer: With JioTV Premium Plan, you unlock subscriptions to 11 top OTT apps, giving you a bundle of entertainment, from movies to sports and more. Plus, a few plans include unlimited voice and data benefits. Also, the OTT content can be accessed directly through just one app, which is the JioTV app. This eliminates the hassle of remembering multiple passwords and managing various subscriptions; thus, streamlining your entertainment experience.

question: Is the JioTV Premium Plan available for recharge through any mode or channel like Paytm, PhonePe, etc.?
answer: Yes, JioTV Premium Plan recharges are available both online and offline. You can recharge at any Jio or partner store, or conveniently through MyJio, Jio.com, JioTV, or any third-party payment app.

question: Do I need to log in separately to each OTT app after activating the JioTV Premium Plan?
answer: With the JioTV Premium Plan, you enjoy the convenience of accessing content from multiple OTT apps in one place, eliminating the need for separate logins or memorising different user IDs and passwords. Within the 'Premium' tab of the JioTV app, you can access paid content in a single click from the following apps: Zee5, Sony LIV, Hoichoi, Lionsgate, Discovery+, SunNXT, Kanchha Lannka, Planet Marathi, Chaupal and FanCode.

question: What is the JioTV Premium Plan?
answer: JioTV Premium Plans are prepaid mobile recharge plans that allow you to access premium content from up to 11 OTT platforms, along with voice calls and data benefits. You can choose from multiple plans. For the latest JioTV Premium Plan tariff and details, please visit www.jio.com

question: Can I log in directly to the OTT app with my Jio Prepaid number with the JioTV Premium Plan activated?
answer: For users recharging with the JioTV Premium Plan, access to premium content from Zee5, Sony LIV, Lionsgate, Discovery+, SunNXT, Hoichoi, Kanchha Lannka, Planet Marathi, Chaupal and FanCode is available through the JioTV app.

question: How can I access 11 OTT subscription content after purchasing a JioTV Premium Plan subscription?
answer: You can directly access the content of the OTT apps through a single app – the 'Premium' section of the JioTV app. Once the JioTV Premium Plan is active on your mobile, please follow the steps below: Download and install the JioTV app on your mobile Log in with your Jio prepaid mobile number (which you used for the recharge) Validate with OTP Open the JioTV app and go to the 'Premium' section indicated with a crown at the bottom middle to access content Depending on your plan, you will be able to enjoy content from OTT apps like Zee5, Sony LIV, Lionsgate, Discovery+, SunNXT, Hoichoi Kanchha Lannka, Planet Marathi, Chaupal and FanCode.

question: Do I need to have 11 OTT apps downloaded before activation?
answer: You don't have to download any apps beforehand. After activating the JioTV Premium Plan, just download the JioTV app. You can watch the content from all the OTT apps on the JioTV app.

question: How many devices can I log in to using the same JioTV Premium Plan credentials?
answer: Login access is restricted to one device at a time, and it applies only to the Jio mobile number on which the eligible recharge has been made.

question: How Amazon Prime Lite with Jio is different from regular Amazon Prime subscription?
answer: While Amazon Prime Lite with Jio provides access to key features such as fast delivery and Prime Video, it differs from the regular Prime subscription by excluding additional perks like Prime Music, Prime Reading, and unlimited photo storage.

question: Will this JioTV Premium Plan consume a lot of data?
answer: No, the JioTV Premium Plan optimises data usage based on your network speed. It automatically adjusts video quality and lets you choose between high, medium, or low settings to control data consumption.

question: Am I supposed to complete the upgrade/installation of OTT apps after the purchase of the JioTV Premium bundle recharge offer?
answer: You will be able to access content without any updates. However, it is recommended to have the most recent or upgraded version of the app to avoid any issues in accessing premium content.

question: What does the crown on content thumbnails in JioTV mean?
answer: The crown on the content thumbnail means that it contains all the premium content that can be accessed only after purchasing and activating the JioTV Premium Plan. For example, to access Sony LIV’s premium content users need to recharge with a Jio plan which has a Sony LIV subscription bundled in it.

question: After recharging with the JioTV Premium Plan, can I download the content to watch later?
answer: No, currently the download option is not available. We will notify you once the download option is available.

question: After purchasing the JioTV Premium Plan, I am unable to see it in 'My Plans'. What should I do?
answer: You can go to the vMyJio app and open 'My Plans' to check the plan details. Alternatively, you can also reach out to our Jio Customer Care at 198/18008899999 or click here (https://www.jio.com/help/contact-us) for support through chat or mail.

question: How will I know the status of the JioTV Premium Plan (if availed or not) under the Jio recharge?

question: What do I get with a JioHotstar Mobile subscription?
answer: With a JioHotstar Mobile subscription, you can enjoy access to: LIVE Sports JioHotstar Special The latest blockbuster Bollywood movies Access to all content on 1 device (mobile).

question: I already have an active subscription to a few/all OTT apps on my account with a JioPrepaid number. Can I still avail of this offer?
answer: Your individual subscriptions to the OTT platforms are independent of the JioTV Premium Plan. Once you recharge with a Jio Premium Plan, you will get a separate subscription to OTT apps provided through the JioTV 'Premium' tab (crown icon)

question: I am unable to play premium content even after purchasing the JioTV Premium Plan. What should I do?
answer: First, update your JioTV app to the latest version to enjoy premium OTT content. Alternatively, you can go to the MyJio app and open 'My Plans' to check if the recharged plan is in active state. Your subscription starts from the day your Jio Entertainment OTT recharge plan is active. question: How do I get a subscription to JioHotstar mobile on Jio?
answer: You can avail JioHotstar mobile subscription with the available bundled recharge offer: Recharge with the plan offering JioHotstar subscription through MyJio or Jio.com, Jio store, Jio retailer or 3rd party Apps. Post recharge, you need to sign in to the JioHotstar app with the same Jio mobile number on which the said recharge has been made. Complete the sign-in by providing the OTP sent to your Jio number.

question: What is the process if I have forgotten my Amazon Login ID?
answer: You contact Jio customer support and receive the External ID. You can then share your External ID with Amazon customer support to get help with login credentials. Amazon customer support gets the required information and contacts back to you to recover login information.

question: I have upgraded to an eligible JioPostpaid Plus plan but I am still not able to watch Prime Video?
answer: You need to activate Amazon Prime through MyJio app to get one year of Amazon Prime at no extra cost. Also, please note that eligible JioPostPaid Plus plan need to be active plan and only after that you will be able to activate Amazon Prime through MyJio App.

question: In case where my JioPostpaid Plus connection is in suspension/termination stage and I pay/clear my dues, will I get Amazon Prime benefit again?
answer: 1 year Amazon Prime subscription offer is a one time offer. In case the offer is cancelled, you will not be able to enjoy the same benefits even after clearing past dues and reactivating the connection.

question: I have activated JioPostpaid Plus plan with Amazon Prime, but the banner for activation is not getting displayed on MyJio app, what should I do?
answer: Please check whether you have latest version of MyJio App, if not, update the App. If you have the latest App & banner is still not visible, you should reach out to Jio customer support at care@jio.com

question: Can I set up JioAutoPay for Add-on / Top Up / ISD / roaming packs?
answer: No you cannot set up the JioAutoPay for Add-on / Top Up / ISD roaming packs. The JioAutoPay is applicable only on recharge plan.

question: When will my card / account / wallet be charged if I have set up a JioAutoPay for recharge?
answer: Payment for JioAutoPay shall be presented to the bank 5 days before the date of expiry of current plan. However for long-term plans with no daily FUP, JioAutoPay shall be presented to the bank basis your data usage reaching 90% of the data entitlement of your plan. Please note that Jio reserves the right to make changes to the above clause threshold based on the data usage and payment cycles. Jio will inform you about such change in advance.

question: What is JioAutoPay for Prepaid?
answer: JioAutoPay is a facility by which you can opt for recharge of your Prepaid number by using bank account number authenticating via net banking or debit card.

question: On how many screen / devices can I see the Amazon Prime video under Jio Postpaid Plans?
answer: Amazon Prime video can be downloaded on multiple devices and up to 3 devices can stream simultaneously with same login credentials and only 2 devices can simultaneously view same title/content.

question: How can I cancel JioAutoPay?
answer: Please find below steps to cancel JioAutoPay through MyJio App. Step 1 : Open MyJio App Step 2 : Tap on the Menu option (Top Left corner) Step 3 : Tap on JioPay and Select JioAutoPay Step 4 : Now select the Bank/Credit Card no. details, click on "Cancel" to cancel JioAutoPay

question: If due to any reason, the recharge through JioAutoPay fails, will I be notified?
answer: Yes, you will be notified through your registered email account & registered mobile number with the recharge failure reasons.

question: If due to any reason, the recharge through JioAutoPay fails, will Jio reattempt the transaction automatically or will I have to recharge again?
answer: If one or more successive payments/instructions are not honored on or before the due date, Jio reserves the right to withdraw the JioAutoPay facility without giving any notice, and to initiate any other action/proceedings as may be deemed appropriate by the Jio for recovery of the unpaid amount from you. In the event your standing instruction is dishonored by bank, penalty charge (or such other amount as specified by Jio from time to time) may be levied per instance of such failure of receipt of payment.

question: From where can I opt for JioAutoPay?
answer: You can set up JioAutoPay through Self-care (Jio.com & MyJio app). Shortly it shall be also available at Jio Stores/Retailers.

question: I already have 3 plans in queue and I have signed up for JioAutoPay. Will the charging start automatically based on current plan expiry OR after expiry of all plans in queue?
answer: After the expiry of all the queued plans, the JioAutoPay services will be activated however, only >= 149 paid queue plan shall be considered as queued plan for JioAutoPay instruction to bank.

question: Will I receive an invoice in case of JioAutoPay debits?
answer: Yes. An invoice will be available to you through Self-Care (MyJio/Jio.com).

question: What is the UPI tab in MyJio? What is it used for? (OR) What kind of transactions can I perform using UPI?
answer: We have introduced BHIM UPI functionality in MyJio app, by using this functionality you can create your own a Jio UPI handle by linking any Savings, Current or Overdraft account to it and using it as a payment mode for performing transactions. You can perform various transactions using a Jio UPI handle like instant money transfer from 1 bank to another, Bill Payment, Recharge and so also pay merchants who accept UPI as payment mode. The UPI tab is currently available to all MyJio Customers.

question: What billers are available for use for UPI?
answer: All billers which are under the BharatBillPay--> BillPay System are available for use under MyJio UPI.

question: When will I know if my account is getting debited?
answer: You will be notified 7 days before the expiry of the plan regarding the auto recharge debit. 5 days before the plan expiry, JioAutoPay will be presented to the bank for payment and re-attempted before 1 day in case of first failed attempt. This will be notified on your registered email account & registered mobile number.

question: I don t have a Jio number, will I be able to create a Jio UPI handle?
answer: You can create an @Jio UPI handle only if you are a MyJio--> MyJio or JioMoney customer.

question: Can I use my existing UPI ID in MyJio?
answer: To use the UPI service from MyJio app , you will have to create a unique Jio handle by linking your Savings, Current or Overdraft Account to it. Any other existing UPI ID cannot be used

question: How many Bank accounts can I link with MyJio?
answer: There is no limit on the number of bank accounts that you can link with MyJio. However please assure that the bank account that you are trying to link to MyJio should be linked with the mobile number that was used while creating the UPI Account. As UPI fetches the bank account from the mobile number that was used while creating the UPI account.

question: Is there any limit on transactions performed through UPI ID? (OR) What is the minimum and maximum limit of money transfer and number of transactions through UPI?

question: How can I change the recharge amount in JioAutoPay?
answer: The option to change the JioAutoPay Recharge Amount is available on the MyJio app and www.jio.com/myaccount. Here're steps to change your plan via MyJio: Step 1: Open the MyJio app Step 2: Click on the menu option (top left corner) Step 3: Tap on 'JioPay' Step 4: Select JioAutoPay Step 5: Under details, select 'Change Plan' Step 6: Select the “Plan” of your choice and click on proceed Step 7: You will see a confirmation message and an SMS notification stating: “Your request for 'Change Plan' has been successfully submitted. Any modification/cancellation of AutoPay shall be effective from the upcoming debit trigger of AutoPay which is 5 days before the expiry of the (last) active plan or upon 90% of the data consumption for long-term plans with no daily data limit."

question: How do I create a UPI Handle on MyJio?
answer: When you first complete the device binding process for MyJio UPI, you will find your VPA handle already created for you at the end of the process. This handle will always be your PhoneNumber@Jio.

question: How will I get to know if the cashback voucher, under the "Jio Motorola One power Offer", has been credited to my account? And where can I view the voucher?
answer: You will be notified through appropriate channel when the cashback vouchers have been credited to your account. You can view the cashback vouchers under the “My Vouchers” section in MyJio app.

question: What is the difference between VPA and UPI?
answer: VPA or Handle – A VPA or a Handle is a unique identifier for your account which allows us to identify your transactions as exclusively yours. UPI – UPI is the service that creates these handles and allows you to make payments.

question: Why is the UPI tab not visible in MyJio App of my iOS device (For iPhone customers only)?
answer: You will be able to view the UPI tab in MyJio App only if your iOS version is above 6 and 6s.

question: What will happen if I enter the wrong UPI-PIN during a transaction?
answer: If you enter the wrong PIN, your transaction will be declined. You will have to retry the transaction with correct UPI PIN. Please reset your UPI PIN by choosing “Reset Pin “option for the bank account if you have forgotten your UPI PIN.

question: What is UPI PIN?
answer: The UPI PIN is a 4 or 6-digit pin that you can create during your first time registration with MyJio UPI. This PIN is unique to your bank account and not to your mobile number or UPI handle. The length of the PIN is bank specific and is not decided by MyJio. UPI PIN is very confidential as it is used to authenticate all your UPI transactions, hence do not share it with anyone.

question: How many times can I attempt device binding in a day?
answer: You can make 3 attempts of Device binding in a day. Once the limit is breached you will not be able to proceed from the SIM selection screen and will have to wait for next 24 hours to retry device binding.

question: Why did my verification SMS fail for my iOS device? (For iPhone customers only)
answer: You must send the verification SMS within 5 seconds from the time of process initiation. However, if you exceed the time limit your SMS verification request will fail and you will have to send SMS again.

question: How can I reset my UPI PIN? What happens if I forgot my UPI PIN?
answer: As your UPI PIN is unique to your bank account and not to your mobile number, you can reset it when you register a bank account or by choosing “Reset Pin “option for the bank account in the MyJio App

question: Do I need to register a beneficiary before transferring funds through UPI?
answer: For UPI transactions you are not required to register a beneficiary for fund transfer. You can send money by QR code, mobile number or bank account with IFSC code combination and a UPI handle.

question: Why has my device binding request declined?
answer: If the same SMS of device binding is copied from the original source (device) and sent to another number on a different device, then device binding request will be declined for both the numbers.

question: Why is the QR code reader not working/scanning, while performing Physical Merchant transaction?
answer: QR codes which are not compliant with the latest standards for QR codes, they may not work. Please try performing at other Merchant Outlets.

question: I am putting correct UPI PIN however it is not being accepted, what do I do?
answer: Please reset your UPI Pin for the account by choosing “Reset Pin” option for the bank account.

question: Do I need to register before performing a UPI transaction?
answer: Yes, you would be required to register for UPI services on MyJio before you can perform a transaction.

question: Can my UPI handle be linked to a card or wallet?
answer: UPI is directly linked with bank account. A credit/debit card or a wallet is not required for UPI transaction.

question: Why has my device binding request failed?
answer: You must complete your device binding process within 30 seconds from the time you have initiated. However, if you have exceeded the time limit your request will fail and you will have to try again..

question: Can I link more than one bank account to the same VPA Handle?
answer: Yes, you can link more than 1 bank account to the same VPA Handle.

question: What kind of banks accounts can be added through UPI?
answer: You can add Savings, Current and Overdraft bank accounts.

question: How can I pay an online merchant through UPI?
answer: You can pay a merchant by inputting your MyJio UPI handle at the merchant website, and then accepting the request that is sent to your MyJio UPI account. You may also pay the merchant by scanning a QR code presented by the merchant.

question: Does the beneficiary also have to register for UPI for receiving funds?
answer: No. You can initiate a transfer using the beneficiary’s bank account number and IFSC code.

question: What happens if my mobile phone is lost?
answer: Your accounts is safe as for performing the UPI transaction, UPI PIN is mandatory. Please do not share your UPI PIN as it is very confidential.

question: Can I put a stop payment request for funds transferred by UPI?
answer: MyJio cannot put a stop payment for funds transferred by UPI.

question: Why does it show verified/unverified merchants when I scan or put in a merchant VPA?
answer: Verified Merchants: These merchants are trusted merchant that has been securely added to the UPI system. You can safely make payment to Verified Merchant. Unverified Merchants: These merchants are not verified on the UPI system. However, you may still make payments to these merchants.

question: What is Samsung Galaxy S10 Jio Online Offer 2019 ?
answer: The offer entitles you to complimentary one year of Jio service for all Jio customers (existing and new) who purchase Samsung Galaxy S10+ or Samsung Galaxy S10 or Samsung Galaxy S10e on or after 22nd July 2019 from www.jio.com website. Such complimentary Jio service will have the offer benefits which entitles an Eligible Subscriber, for a validity of 365 days, (i) 1.5 GB high speed data per day (post which unlimited data at 64Kbps); (ii) Unlimited national voice calls in home and national roaming ; (iii) 100 national SMS per day in home and national roaming. The eligible subscriber will also get the benefit of additional data up to 78GB, in form of 13 additional data vouchers of 6 GB each. The offer benefits and additional data vouchers will be automatically credited and the eligible subscriber will need to redeem the vouchers through MyJio app to avail benefits on the eligible device.

question: What Samsung Galaxy models are eligible for the offer?

question: What happens if I want to cancel my Prime Lite membership under a Jio bundle recharge?
answer: The Jio Amazon Prime Lite membership is included in your Jio bundle recharge. If you wish to cancel your subscription before the end of the validity of your recharge plan, you will lose the recharge benefits along with the associated Prime Lite membership. To cancel the subscription within validity, you are required to write to us at care@jio.com.

question: What is the process of activating Amazon Prime Lite with Jio membership after activating Jio Postpaid Plan?
answer: Once Jio Postpaid Plan connection is active on your mobile number, you can follow these three simple steps to activate Amazon Prime Lite with Jio membership: On plan activation, you will get an SMS from Jio with message/link details that leads to download of MyJio app You will be required to Install MyJio app on your mobile and click on the “Activate Now” on Amazon Prime Lite banner on the app homepage Login to Amazon Prime through the link provided to activate Amazon Prime Lite membership with an existing Amazon account or by creating a new Amazon account and Amazon Prime Lite with Jio membership will be instantly activated Use the same credentials to log-in on to Amazon Prime video and Amazon Shopping to enjoy the Amazon Prime Lite with Jio benefits

question: What is the process if I forget my Amazon Prime Lite login ID?
answer: To find your entitlement ID, go to MyJio and follow this path: 1) View Plan 2) My Subscriptions 3) Manage Subscriptions 4) Amazon Prime Lite 5) Entitlement ID Then, contact Amazon customer support and provide them with your entitlement ID for assistance with your login details. They will gather the necessary information and get back to you to help you recover your login information.

question: Can I use the Amazon Prime Lite offer on multiple devices using the same phone number?
answer: You can log in to multiple devices using the same phone number, but at any point, you can use it only on one device concurrently.

However, if within 2 years you downgrade your plan to an ineligible plan or is not on active eligible plan then Amazon Prime Lite with Jio benefit will be cancelled.

question: What happens if I want to cancel Amazon Prime Lite with Jio membership under Jio Postpaid Plans?
answer: In case you wish to cancel your subscription within 2 years, you will lose the benefits associated with Amazon Prime Lite with Jio membership. To cancel Amazon Prime Lite with Jio subscription within 2 years, you are required to write to us at care@jio.com. To avoid Amazon renewal charges, you must cancel your subscription within three days of the bill generation date. Within the 3-day window:You can make a partial payment on your bill, excluding the Amazon subscription amount, and cancel your subscription. You have up to 59 days to complete this. After the 3-day window:You must pay the full bill amount, including the Amazon charges. The charges will be reversed and credited to your next bill after you cancel the subscription.

question: What is the applicable security deposit in the JioFiber Postpaid plans?
answer: With JioFiber Postpaid, you get the convenience of long-term plans without paying any additional security deposit. All 3-month, 6-month, and 12-month advance payment JioFiber Postpaid plans come with zero security deposit for the ONT (internet box), the JioFiber Set Top Box, and installation. This means you only pay for the plan you choose. There are no extra upfront charges, no hidden fees, and no equipment deposits. Your devices are provided by Jio as part of your postpaid experience and remain active as long as your plan stays active. Choosing a long-term advance payment plan not only removes security deposits but also gives you: Faster installation Seamless setup without paperwork Premium OTT benefits on eligible JioFiber bundled plans Consistent monthly billing with no recharge reminders If you’re migrating from prepaid to postpaid, your existing equipment continues to work without any additional deposit.

question: Is there a fair usage policy? Will my internet speed be downgraded during the month?
answer: These are unlimited plans for home use only. You can consume unlimited data at high speed. However, RJIL may discontinue the data services in case of misuse, fraudulent, unauthorised or commercial use.

question: What OTT subscription services are included in the new JioFiber plans?
answer: The latest JioFiber broadband plans come bundled with subscriptions to 16 leading OTT apps, giving you access to premium entertainment - from movies and TV shows to live sports and regional content - all through your Jio Set Top Box (STB). To enjoy these OTT subscriptions, make sure your Jio Set Top Box is connected to your JioFiber network. Each JioFiber plan includes a specific set of OTT apps, which you can view in your plan details. List of 16 OTT apps available with JioFiber Postpaid Plans: 1. Netflix 2. Amazon Prime Video 3. JioHotstar 4. SONYLIV 5. ZEE5 6. SUNNXT 7. TarangPlus 8. TimesPlay 9. HOICHOI 10. SHEMAROOME 11. LIONSGATE PLAY 12. EROS NOW 13. DISCOVERY PLUS 14. ETV Win 15. FanCode 16. YouTube Premium​ With JioFiber’s OTT subscription plans, you get: Seamless access to movies, web series, sports, and regional shows through a single login. A unified streaming experience on your Jio Set-Top Box — no need to juggle multiple apps or payments. High-definition (HD) and 4K content powered by JioFiber’s ultra-fast internet speeds. Automatic OTT app activation linked to your JioFiber-registered mobile number (RMN). Tip: To check which OTT subscriptions are available in your current plan, open the MyJio app → Fiber Account → My Plans → OTT Subscriptions section. Come, enjoy premium entertainment from India’s top OTT platforms packed in one JioFiber plan.

question: Are the JioFiber Postpaid plans available for Enterprise users?
answer: These plans are for retail customers. For enterprise and small business users, we offer different plans. Please visit Jio.com for more details.

question: What happens after my validity of 3/6/12 Months is over?
answer: As a default process, once 3/6/12 month validity is over, Users will be put onto the monthly plan of the selected value. For example, if a user is on a 6-month plan of ₹999, they will continue to be on ₹999 monthly plan and get monthly bills against their JioFiber Postpaid service.

question: How do I make international calls using my Jio mobile number?
answer: You can make international calls on your Jio number by activating a prepaid ISD pack through the MyJio app or Jio.com. You can either choose the Global ISD pack for international calls to 230 countries starting at just 50p/min or any ISD minute pack for international calls to specific countries. To activate an international calling pack instantly: On the MyJio app: Open MyJio Tap Mobile and select your Jio number Go to Recharge Select ISD Choose the ISD pack you want Complete payment On Jio.com: Visit Jio.com Select Mobile Select Prepaid → International Services Select Explore ISD Benefits Select ISD pack Enter your Jio number and pay securely Activation is instant, and you can start calling immediately. Why choose Jio international calling packs? Lower calling rates to major countries No additional ISD deposit required Works from anywhere in India Supports calling to landlines and mobiles You can also check pay-as-you-go ISD rates in case you want to make occasional calls without a pack. Before you start calling: Ensure your ISD service is active Keep a sufficient balance or an active prepaid ISD plan Check the country rates and pack benefits in advance If you face issues, go to MyJio → Help & Support and raise a request.

question: What happens to the existing JioFiber customers?
answer: JioFiber postpaid plans are currently available only to new subscribers. Soon, EXISTING prepaid customers will be able to UPGRADE to postpaid plans.

question: How do I avail of Amazon Prime Lite subscription in the new JioFiber Postpaid Plan?
answer: You can avail a complimentary 2-year subscription to Amazon Prime Lite by purchasing an eligible JioFiber Postpaid plan.

question: How can I change my JioFiber Postpaid plan?
answer: You can easily change your JioFiber Postpaid plan using either Jio.com or MyJio app. Using Jio.com: Visit www.jio.com and log in with your Registered Mobile Number (RMN). Click on ‘View Plan’ under your JioFiber account details. Select ‘Change Plan’. Browse and choose the new plan you’d like to switch to. Make a payment for the selected plan to confirm your change. Using the MyJio app: Open the MyJio app and tap on 'JioHome'. Navigate to the ‘Plan’ tab. Tap on ‘Plan Details’ and click 'Change Plan'. Select your preferred plan from the available options. Proceed to make the payment for your new plan. Once the payment is complete, your new JioFiber Postpaid plan will be activated automatically at 00:00 hrs the next day.

question: Can I start with an internet-only JioFiber plan and apply for the Jio Set Top Box later?
answer: Yes, you can start with an internet-only JioFiber plan and request the Jio Set Top Box at a later stage. However, it’s better to begin with any JioFiber bundled plan, because these plans unlock the full experience from Day 1 - high-speed internet, voice calling, and access to top entertainment apps through the Jio Set Top Box. If you start with an internet-only plan, you can still upgrade anytime to a bundled JioFiber plan. Once you upgrade, you’ll be able to claim your Jio Set Top Box, enjoy unlimited data, and get smooth access to premium OTT content. To explore your options, check the latest JioFiber plans on Jio.com and choose the plan that best fits your home entertainment needs.

question: How to check my JioFiber Postpaid current plan details?
answer: You can check your plan details including data usage and subscription status by simply logging into the MyJio app. You can find your current plan details can be checked by clicking on the 'Fiber Tab' and then clicking on 'View Plan'

question: What are the benefits of JioFiber Postpaid autopay functionality?
answer: JioAutoPay is an automated bill payment instruction given by a customer to Jio. You can register for JioAutoPay via MyJio app or Jio.com by using bank account number and authenticating via net banking or debit card.. The following are the benefits of opting for autopay: Ensures payment due to Jio is paid out automatically every month On-time 100% digital auto payment to avoid any late payment fees Enjoy uninterrupted services The customer does not have to remember the due date anymore to pay the due amount as payment deduction is automated Note – JioAutoPay is currently only available for JioFiber Users and not for JioAirFiber Users.

question: Transfer of Ownership
answer: Transfer of Ownership for Mobile connection is allowed to Blood Relatives & Spouse only. Scenario 1. If an existing customer wishes to transfer ownership of a mobile connection willingly to his / her blood relatives or spouse, Documents Required: For Existing Customer (Transferor): Mobile number No Objection Certificate (NOC).Click here for the NOC document format Aadhaar or any valid POA/POI For New Customer (Transferee): Aadhaar or any valid POA/POI of blood relative or spouse Proof of Relationship with the existing mobile number owner (Transferor) Both the transferor and transferee need to visit the Jio store ; with above-mentioned documents to place the request. Please note: The addresses of both the transferee and the transferor should be the same. Scenario 2. Transfer of ownership for mobile connection in case of death of the existing customer, Documents Required: For Existing Customer (Transferor - Demised): Mobile number Death certificate Aadhaar or any valid POA/POI For New Customer (Transferee): Aadhaar or any valid POA/POI of blood relative or spouse Proof of Relationship with the existing mobile number owner (Transferor) The Transferee needs to visit the Jio store ; with above mentioned documents to place a request. Please note: The addresses of both the transferee and the transferor should be the same.

question: How do I migrate/add my Jio prepaid number to a JioPlus Family Plan?
answer: You can add your Jio prepaid number directly as a child under the JioPlus Family Plan. Follow these steps: Login: Sign in to MyJio or Jio.com with your Jio Prepaid number that you want to convert/ add in JioPlus Family Plan. Navigate to Settings: Go to the menu, select "Settings," and click on the "Switch to Postpaid" option to migrate your number to postpaid. Validate OTP: Enter the OTP received on your prepaid number and click "Join as a member" to add it to the JioPlus Family Plan. Enter Parent Number: Provide the valid Parent Number for the JioPlus Family Plan. Generate OTP: Click on "Generate OTP" and validate the OTP sent to the Parent Number. Complete the Process: After validation, click "Pay ₹0" to complete the process. Confirmation: Notification confirmation on successful migration and addition in Family Plan complete within 30 minutes.

question: What is JioGames Cloud?
answer: JioGames Cloud is a cutting-edge cloud gaming platform that allows anyone with a smartphone or a regular laptop/desktop or Jio-STB to play high-end console-quality games without needing any additional hardware.

question: Does JioGames Cloud have a multi-platform play?
answer: Yes, JioGames Cloud supports multi-platform play. Users can play on different platforms using a single account that has an active subscription. Progress saved by a game on one platform, can be continued on another supported platform of the user’s choice. However, it's important to note that a specific user can only be active on one platform at a time. The user will not be able to play on multiple platforms simultaneously.

question: What do I need to play games?
answer: To play on JioGames Cloud, you would need either a Smartphone, or a Laptop/Desktop or a Jio-STB with a stable Internet Connection and an active JioGames Cloud gaming plan.

question: Do I need to use the Jio Controller to play games on Jio STB?
answer: JioGames Cloud can be best experienced with a JioGames Controller. However, many aftermarket controllers are compatible with JioGames Cloud, allowing you to use these controllers to play games on Jio STB. List of some compatible controllers can be found at https://jiogames.com/supported-controllers .

question: What are the plan options available in JioGames Cloud bundle?
answer: You can opt for JioGames Cloud bundled connectivity plans or JioGames Cloud add-ons along with your Jio mobile connection. You will find multiple options of plans and addon combinations at www.Jio.com, MyJio application, and other recharge platforms.

question: How many users are allowed access per account?
answer: One user is allowed to play on any platform at any given point of time using a single account.

question: Can I recharge this plan before my current one expires?
answer: Yes, you can recharge your plan in advance. The newly recharged plan will be queued and activated automatically once the current plan expires.

question: What happens to my gaming service if I don’t recharge after my plan expires?
answer: Access to JioGames Cloud will stop once your plan expires. You need to recharge with an eligible plan to resume access.

question: Which games are available with this subscription?
answer: JioGames Cloud offers 400+ games across genres, including action, racing, adventure, sports, and casual games. New titles are added weekly and can be discovered via New Releases / Coming Soon sections on all platforms.

question: Can I play multiplayer games with friends?
answer: Yes, many games on JioGames Cloud support local multiplayer features (e.g., couch multiplayer, split-screen or same-device multiplayer), but online multiplayer is not supported currently.

question: How do I activate the gaming service after purchasing the plan?
answer: Activation is automatic. Once the recharge is successful, visit the JioGames app or website and log in with Jio number to start playing.

question: What should I do if the gaming app is not working?
answer: Try clearing the app cache, restarting your device, and ensuring your internet connection is stable. If you are facing further issues, you can contact the JioGames Support helpline via email on support@jiogames.com.

question: Can I access the gaming service while roaming?
answer: Yes, the service can be accessed anywhere in India with a stable internet connection.

question: Where can I download the app from?
answer: You can download the JioGames app for: Jio STB: JioGames app is pre-installed on the Jio STB Supported Browsers: Visit https://www.jiogames.com Android Phones: from the Google Play Store https://play.google.com/store/apps/details?id=com.jio.jiogames&hl=en_IN&pli=1 Apple Phones: from the Apple App Store. https://apps.apple.com/in/app/jiogames/id1574760422

question: How do I select a Jio Matching number?
answer: A Jio Matching Number is a mobile number that is similar to your existing number. You need to provide your existing number. In case you have entered a non-Jio number, we would also need your PIN Code to check the availability of similar, matching numbers in your area. The existing number can be any number - either yours or your loved ones with whom you want to match your new mobile number. Just keep in mind, the number has to be handy so that you can provide the OTP for verification and proceed to order it. For more details please visit https://www.jio.com/selfcare/choice-number/

question: What is the Jio Matching number?
answer: Jio Matching Number allows you to choose a new Jio mobile number that is similar to your existing Jio or non-Jio number. It is ideal for twinning with a partner, gifting to a friend, or using matching numbers within a family. You can browse and select matching number options online at https://www.jio.com/ or visit a Jio retail store to buy a mobile number of your choice. The service suggests numbers with similar matching digits based on your current number. This makes it easy to select a number that feels familiar and personalised. Matching numbers are available for both prepaid and postpaid connections, subject to availability and the selected plan. Special Offer: Get a matching number worth ₹499 for just ₹50. ₹349 Hybrid Prepaid Eligibility: The matching number can be activated with the ₹349 hybrid plan, which includes: - Unlimited voice calls - Unlimited 5G data - 56 GB high-speed data (2 GB/day, thereafter unlimited at 64 Kbps) - JioHotstar subscription (limited-period offer) - 100 SMS/day - Access to Jio apps - Validity: 28 days For more details, refer to Terms & Conditions.

question: Can I switch to a postpaid plan with my matching number?
answer: Yes, one of the key features of Jio Matching number is that you can switch to any available Jio postpaid plan through www.jio.com or the MyJio app. During the plan change, you’ll need to make the applicable payment as per Jio’s standard process.

question: Can I get a matching number for a friend or family member?
answer: Absolutely! You can book a matching number for friends or family. Simply share the booked number and booking code with them to complete the activation process.

question: What happens to the plan after the initial 28 days?
answer: After the 28-day validity period, you can recharge with any available Jio prepaid plan to continue enjoying seamless connectivity. Explore and select plans via www.jio.com or the MyJio app.

question: What is the Jio Starter Pack and what are its benefits?
answer: The Jio Starter Pack costs ₹349 and gives you exciting benefits such as: 28 days of Jio mobile service with Unlimited 5G data and free voice calls 90-day subscription to JioHotstar (Mobile) 50 GB of JioAICloud storage Note: The Jio Starter Pack can be used only with the ₹349 prepaid plan.

question: I have a non-Jio number. Can I still purchase the Jio Starter Pack?
answer: Yes, you can buy the Jio Starter Pack using any mobile number, whether Jio or non-Jio. You can use the pack to get a new Jio number or port your existing number to Jio - all through a simple 3-step self-KYC process.

question: How do I transfer the Jio Starter Pack to someone else?
answer: It's simple. To transfer the Jio Started Pack to someone else, please follow these quick steps. Open the MyJio app and go to the ‘Vouchers’ section. Find the Jio Starter Pack voucher and tap on ‘Transfer’. Enter the recipient's mobile number to complete the transfer. With that, the Pack is transferred for the recipient to redeem.

question: How do I redeem the Jio Starter Pack?
answer: It's simple. To redeem the Jio Started Pack for someone else, please follow these quick steps. Go to Jio SIM and click on ‘Redeem Jio Starter Pack’. Complete the 3-step self-KYC process. On the payment page, select ‘Redeem voucher’, enter your mobile number, and verify it with an OTP. Note: The voucher can only be redeemed for the ₹349 prepaid plan.

question: How will I get my new Jio SIM after redeeming the Jio Starter Pack?
answer: After completing the self-KYC process, your new Jio SIM will be delivered to your home free of charge.

question: What is the validity of the Jio Starter Pack benefits after redemption?
answer: On the Jio Starter Pack, mobile data and voice calling are valid for 28 days. However, to enjoy 90 days of free JioHotstar (part of the Jio Unlimited Offer), you can keep the ₹349 plan active by recharging every 28 days.

question: Can I get a Matching Number on a Prepaid plan instead of Postpaid?
answer: Yes, Matching Numbers are available with both Prepaid recharges and Postpaid plans. You can book your Matching Number for just Rs. 50 under our limited-time offer. Post booking your number and upon collection of new SIM, you can recharge with Rs. 349 plan, which gives you: Unlimited Voice Calls Unlimited 5G Data 56 GB High-Speed Data (2 GB/day, thereafter unlimited at 64 Kbps) JioHostar Subscription (limited period offer) 100 SMS/Day Free Jio Apps Subscription Validity: 28 days Once your 28-day validity ends, you have two options: Option 1: Continue with a Prepaid recharges of your liking Option 2: If you prefer postpaid connection, you can switch to any standard Postpaid plan.

question: Will I receive a monthly bill after activating my Matching Number?
answer: No, you won't receive any monthly bill. With your Matching Number you only need to recharge to continue using the service. A monthly bill will only be generated if you move to a Postpaid billing plan

question: What does a "Hybrid Prepaid Plan" mean?
answer: Hybrid Plans are available for recharge by both Prepaid and Postpaid users, no matter what type of connection you have. Even though your Matching Number is a Postpaid connection, it behaves just like a Prepaid connection, giving you the flexibility to recharge, with no monthly bills.

question: What is the Jio Anniversary Celebration Offer?
answer: The Jio Anniversary Celebration Offer has expired. It was available during Jio’s Anniversary Month from 5th September to 5th October 2025. Most of you, including our existing and new Jio customers who recharged with ₹349 or above plans, were eligible for its exclusive benefits. The benefits included unlimited 5G data and vouchers worth ₹3,000. Plus, as part of the Celebration Year Offer, on completing 12 consecutive monthly on-time recharges of ₹349 or above, your 13th-month recharge was made free.

question: What is Jio's Celebration Month Offer?
answer: The Jio Celebration Month Offer was available during Jio’s Anniversary Month, from 5th September to 5th October 2025. Most of you, including our existing and new Jio customers who recharged with ₹349 or above plans, were eligible for its exclusive benefits. The benefits included unlimited 5G data and vouchers worth ₹3,000.

question: How to avail the brand offers available with the Celebration Month Jio Recharge?
answer: The Jio Anniversary Celebration Offer was valid from 5th September to 5th October 2025. If you recharged with an eligible plan during this period, please check the 'Coupons' section in the MyJio app for any unused vouchers. These coupons can be redeemed within 5 days from the date they were credited to your account.

question: If my new recharge is queued during the Jio Anniversary Celebration Offer, will I still get the benefits?
answer: Yes, as long as you have recharged your Jio mobile number with an eligible plan between 5th September and 5th October 2025, i.e., the offer period, you’ll receive the offer benefits, even if the plan is queued.

question: If I recharge with multiple eligible plans during the Jio Anniversary Celebration Month Offer period, will I receive multiple sets of vouchers (Zomato Gold, AJIO, Netmeds, Reliance Digital cashback, etc.)?
answer: The Jio Anniversary Celebration Month Offer was available during Jio’s Anniversary Month, from 5th September to 5th October 2025. Existing and new Jio customers who recharged with ₹349 or above were eligible for exclusive benefits, including unlimited 5G data and vouchers worth ₹3,000. All successful recharges done within the offer period are eligible for the Jio Anniversary Celebration Month Offer. You will receive the respective offer benefits for each eligible recharge.

question: If I have been recharging with 349 or eligible plans under the Jio Anniversary Celebration Year Offer, when will the free 13th-month recharge or voucher be credited?
answer: The Jio Anniversary Celebration Offer was valid from 5th September to 5th October 2025. To qualify for the free 13th-month recharge: The first recharge had to be done during the offer period. After that, the next 11 consecutive monthly on-time recharges of eligible plans, i.e., ₹349, ₹399, ₹445, ₹449, or ₹545. There should be no gap between two recharges (i.e., each recharge had to be done before the current plan expires). If you fulfil this condition, you will be eligible for the 13th-month free recharge, which will be credited only after the 12th recharge becomes active.

question: What is the new Bangladesh ISD Pack?
answer: Jio has launched new SD calling Minute Packs. The new Bangladesh ISD Pack offers 15 minutes of calling to Bangladesh. ISD country area codes (destination codes) are available on Jio.com. Just open the site, go to the ‘Mobile’ page and select ‘International Services’. Over there, check ISD plans and for more information about any plan, tap on ‘View details’. Standard pay-go rates will be applicable for rest of the world (ROW) calls. Countries with ISD Minute Pack Available MRP (₹) ISD Calling Entitlement (in minutes) Validity (in days) Bangladesh 47 15 7 Note: Pack minutes quota consumption to happen at per second pulse. So that customers can do full consumption of the pack. Pack minutes quota can be consumed for ISD calls to eligible area codes only.

question: How can I check the balance/remaining ISD minutes available for the ISD Minute pack I have activated?
answer: After you make an ISD call to any of the eligible country codes, you will receive end of call notification (Flash Message). This flash message specifies the seconds consumed and the available balance. Customers can check the balance entitlement available on the ISD Minute pack on the MyJio app as well.

The offer is available for customers on 4G and 5G networks who recharge with ₹349 or above plans (2 GB/day and above plans). The offer starts on 17th March 2025, and free 3-month JioHotstar subscription will be effective 22nd March 2025 for eligible prepaid recharges and postpaid plans. With JioHotstar subscription users can watch the all content on JioHotstar on any smartphone.

question: What is VoNR/Vo5G? What is the benefit of VoNR/Vo5G?
answer: VoNR (Voice over New Radio) is a way to make phone calls using a 5G network, like how VoLTE (Voice over LTE) works on 4G networks. You just need to be in a 5G coverage area, and your device must support VoNR. Also, ensure that your mobile is updated with the latest software released by your device manufacturer, and voice over 5G/NR settings are enabled. With VoNR-enabled, you can enjoy: Clearer voice calls with better sound quality. Quicker connections when making calls. i.e. your calls will connect faster, so you spend less time waiting for the call to go through Use 5G data and calls at the same time without interruptions. This means you can browse the internet, stream videos, or use apps that require data while you’re on a call, without experiencing call drops or speed issues.

question: VoNR/Vo5G is visible on my device, what is it?
answer: If VoNR is visible on your device, it means your phone can make voice calls over a 5G network (Voice over New Radio, VoNR). VoNR , i.e. Voice over New Radio, is a way to make phone calls using a 5G network, like how VoLTE (Voice over LTE) works on 4G networks. You just need to be in a 5G coverage area, and your device must support VoNR. Ensure that your mobile is updated with latest Software released by your device manufacturer & Voice over 5G/NR settings is enabled.

question: How do I check if my device supports VoNR/Vo5G?
answer: You can check your device's compatibility by searching for 'VoNR/Vo5G/Voice over 5G SA' in 'Settings' under 'Mobile Networks', or you can confirm the same by visiting the manufacturer's website or at their service centre.

question: Why is VoNR/Vo5G not working even though I am connected to a 5G network?
answer: Ensure your phone supports VoNR/Vo5G and is updated to the latest software version, and voice over 5G/NR settings are enabled. With these settings, as a 5G customer with a 5G device, you can make voice calls using VoNR, provided you are in 5G coverage.

question: How do I enable/disable VoNR/Vo5G on my device?
answer: VoNR can be enabled in your phone’s settings under 'Mobile Networks', often listed as 'VoNR/Vo5G/Voice over 5G SA'. If unavailable, your device may not support it yet. Just ensure that your mobile is updated with the latest software released by your device manufacturer. You can confirm the same by visiting the manufacturer's website or at their service centre.

question: Is a software update required to enable VoNR/Vo5G?
answer: Yes, many devices need a software update to enable VoNR. You can check for the latest updates in your phone’s settings.

question: What happens if I move from a 5G to a 4G area during a VoNR call?
answer: Your call will seamlessly switch from VoNR to VoLTE if you move out of 5G coverage to a 4G coverage area, ensuring no disruption.

question: Is VoNR/Vo5G available in my area?
answer: The VoNR feature is rolled out across pan-India. If you are a 5G user with a 5G device, you can make voice calls using VoNR. Just keep the VoNR 'ON' from your network/data settings and start using. However, you need to ensure that your mobile is updated with the latest software released by your device manufacturer, and voice over 5G/NR settings are enabled.

question: How can I contact Jio for porting or new SIM requests?
answer: Call 1860-893-3333 for Jio porting and new SIM support. This number connects you directly to the Jio sales and support team for Mobile Number Portability (MNP) or new SIM inquiries. You can also ask about Jio prepaid, postpaid, or Fiber plans.

question: What is the Jio Customer Care Number for Jio and Non-Jio Users?
answer: Jio provides 24x7 customer care and call center support through toll-free numbers for both Jio and non-Jio users. Jio users can call 199 from their Jio mobile number. Non-Jio users can call 1800-889-9999 from any network in India. You can contact Jio customer care executives for help with recharge and billing issues, data plans, SIM activation or replacement, network and connectivity problems, JioFiber services, and general support queries. Calling these numbers is free of cost, and no balance is required.

question: What is the Jio recharge enquiry number for prepaid users?
answer: The Jio Recharge Enquiry Number is 1991. Dial 1991 from your Jio mobile to instantly check your Jio recharge status, active plan details, data balance, and validity. This number provides automated updates about your current Jio prepaid pack and renewal reminders.

question: How can I activate my new Jio SIM card?
answer: Dial 1977 to activate your new Jio SIM. Use 1977 for SIM activation, tele-verification, and enabling HD voice and data services. This number helps you complete KYC verification and start using your new Jio connection immediately.

question: How do I contact Jio complaint helpline for network or service issues?
answer: Call the Jio Complaint Number – 198. You can dial 198 (available 24x7) to report network issues, call drops, billing errors, or mobile service complaints. This is the official Jio helpline number to register grievances or connectivity-related problems directly with the customer care team.

question: How will the 13th-month free recharge benefit be given under the Jio Anniversary Celebration Year Offer?

If you fulfil this condition, you will be eligible for the 13th-month free recharge, which will be credited only after the 12th recharge becomes active.

question: Do I need to recharge only with the ₹349 plan 12 times to avail the Jio Anniversary Celebration Year of 1-month free recharge?

To qualify for the free 13th-month recharge: The first recharge had to be done during the offer period, 5th September to 5th October 2025. After that, the next 11 consecutive monthly on-time recharges of eligible plans. There should be no gap between two recharges (i.e., each recharge had to be done before the current plan expires). If you fulfil this condition, you will be eligible for the 13th-month free recharge, which will be credited only after the 12th recharge becomes active.

question: I already have a paid Google One subscription plan. Can I use this offer with the same Google Account (Gmail ID)?
answer: Yes. If you’re already on a Google One subscription obtained directly via Google, you will be prompted to switch to the Google AI Pro plan from Jio during the offer activation process itself. If you have a Google one plan via a third-party, you will need to cancel that membership via the third-party and then re-attempt the Offer activation. Customers who cancel their existing Google One membership will not receive refunds, credits, etc. for any value/time period remaining on their existing Google One membership.

question: Can I continue using the Google Gemini Offer if my Jio plan expires?
answer: To continue using Google Gemini Offer benefits you must continuously be active on an eligible plan, throughout the offer period.

question: I am already enrolled with the Google AI Pro student trial offer. Can I enroll again in this offer?

If the user chooses to switch plans, the existing student trial offer will be automatically cancelled and the Google Gemini Offer from Jio will begin.

question: Will my existing files that are backed up on Google One be deleted if my Google AI Pro Offer is cancelled or ends?
answer: No, your files won’t be deleted right away. If you are over the free 15GB limit after your subscription is cancelled, you can’t add new files, send or receive Gmail messages but your existing files and mails remain accessible. You can view, download, or delete them as needed. If you stay over the limit for two years, Google may delete your data after sending warnings.

question: What happens after the 18-month Google Gemini Offer period ends?

question: I have an issue with my Google AI Pro subscription - who do I contact?

question: My Google Account (Gmail ID) is enrolled with Google Gemini Offer from Jio. Can I change my Gmail ID?

question: How many times can I claim this Google Gemini offer from Jio?

Google AI Pro includes access to the following features and benefits: Gemini app: Get higher access to our most capable model Gemini 3, plus get Deep Research and unlock video generation with limited access to Veo 3.1 Fast Image generation: higher limits on Nano Banana Storage: 5 TB of total storage for Photos, Drive and Gmail Flow: Higher access in our AI filmmaking tool to create cinematic scenes and stories, including limited access to Veo 3 Whisk: Higher access to image-to-video creation with Veo 3.1 Gemini Code Assist and Gemini CLI: Higher daily request limits in Gemini CLI and Gemini Code Assist IDE extensions NotebookLM: Research and writing assistant with 5x more Audio Overviews, notebooks Gemini in Gmail, Docs, Vids and more: Access Gemini directly in Google apps

question: Why is only Jio displaying Customer name and no other operators?
answer: As per the guidelines issued by the Government of India, the Caller Name Display feature has been made mandatory for all telecom operators. This service is presently in the trial phase and is being rolled out in a phased manner across various regions. All operators are currently testing this feature in the same or different states as part of the implementation process.

question: Why am I getting Caller name display on some of the calls I received not for all?
answer: This service is currently in a trial phase across the mobile telecom operators, which is why you may see caller names for some calls but not all at this stage. Name display also has device dependency, kindly keep your phone software updated to use Calling Name Presentation services.

question: I provided my Aadhaar card details as proof and did not give consent for this information to be shared with anyone. No consent was obtained prior to displaying my name.
answer: As per the guidelines issued by the Government of India, the Caller Name Display feature has been made mandatory for all telecom operators. This service is presently in the trial phase and is being rolled out in a phased manner across various regions. Please note that your privacy is protected. Only your registered name is shown, and no Aadhaar details are shared when you make a call.

question: I am using Jio Phone/Jio Bharat/ on My device, why is the caller’s name not showing on my screen?
answer: This feature may work differently depending on the device. Currently, the Caller Name Display feature is not supported on JioPhone or JioBharat devices. Therefore, the caller’s name will not appear on these models.

question: I am using iPhone unable to activate / deactivate call forwarding suddenly after CNAP (Caller Name Presentation) display facility enablement.
answer: CNAP (Caller line name presentation) functionality is getting rolled out as per directions from DOT. This feature is now getting tested at Jio network to prevent suspected fraud, however displaying name also has device & firmware dependency. We recommend you to upgrade your firmware version, we hope that will solve the issue. Alternatively, you may connect with your device manufacturer to solve the issue.

question: What is CNAP (Calling Name Presentation)
answer: The CNAP (Calling Name Presentation) feature is a new system in India that will display a caller's registered name on a recipient's phone, using official Know Your Customer (KYC) data from telecom operators. This initiative, spearheaded by the Department of Telecommunications (DoT) and the Telecom Regulatory Authority of India (TRAI), aims to combat spam, fraud, and cybercrime by providing a government-backed, verified caller ID service.

question: When I am calling someone, the display is showing an incorrect name / different name. I want to get it corrected.  My name spelling getting displayed on the call is different, how can I correct my name spelling?
answer: In accordance with the recent guidelines issued by the Department of Telecommunications (DOT), Government of India, the display of the caller's verified name is now mandatory for all connections. when you place a call to a recipient who does not have your number saved, the name displayed on their screen is automatically sourced from the official ID proof submitted at the time of your connection activation. Currently, there is no provision to change or correct the displayed name. If any such name changes or correction process is notified by the government and made available in future, we will promptly update through our official media.

question: Does CNAP (Caller name presentation) work when calling from WhatsApp or other VoIP apps?
answer: No, CNAP applies only to regular mobile network calls.

question: How CNAP (Caller name presentation) will show my mobile number if CLIR (Caller line identification restriction) functionality is active.
answer: CLIR active connections will continue to display as “Private”.

question: When I am receiving call from someone, name is getting displayed (CNAP) in the incoming call. Request to stop display of my name, as I don’t want to show my name to new callers.
answer: The name displayed is strictly based on the official ownership records of your connection, in compliance with the latest guidelines issued by the Department of Telecommunications (DoT), Government of India. As per Government guidelines, there is no provision for the caller to opt out or stop his / her name being displayed to the calling party.

question: I don’t want caller name displayed when someone is calling me. How can I disable it / switch off this service?
answer: Currently, there is no provision to opt out or stop the CNAP (Caller line name presentation) service by the called party. As and when, such CANP opt out process is notified by the government and made available in future, we will promptly update through our official media.

question: Why CNAP (Caller line name presentation) is not live in our state / location? By when CNAP will go live in our area.
answer: CNAP (Caller line name presentation) functionality is getting rolled out as per directions from DOT, Haryana has been chosen as the first Licensed Service Area for the trial. It will get deployed progressively at your locations too. You will get notifications through official media channels as & when CNAP gets rolled out in your area too.

question: If I’ve saved a contact in my phone, will your service still show the registered name or my saved name?  or When I receive a call from someone whose number I’ve saved, which name will appear — the one from my phonebook or the one registered in your Caller Name Display service?
answer: If you’ve already saved the number in your phonebook, your phone will always show the name you saved. When the number is not saved in your contacts, the name you see is taken from the customer’s official ID used during SIM activation as per Govt guidelines.
