question: Made a Wrong Recharge? Here’s How to Cancel It Instantly
answer: An exclusive guide to reversing incorrect recharges via MyJio and Jio.com. Did you just recharge with the wrong plan? It happens to the best of us! Whether you selected the wrong data pack or tapped the wrong plan, don't panic. We understand that mistakes happen, and we've got you covered. As a valued Jio user, you have exclusive access to a Recharge Reversal feature. This self-service option allows you to cancel a wrong transaction and initiate a refund—but you need to act fast. Here is everything you need to know to fix it right now. The Eligibility Checklist: Before you try to cancel, please ensure your transaction meets these criteria. This feature is designed exclusively for genuine mistakes: Exclusive Channels: Only recharges done directly via the MyJio App or Jio.com are eligible for cancellation and refund Note: Recharges done via third-party apps (like GPay/PhonePe/Paytm), or POS machines (Retailer / Dealer) are not eligible Eligible Customers: This service is applicable to Mobility Retail Prepaid and Postpaid customers only Recharges Only: Covers Prepaid and Postpaid recharges, but not Postpaid bill payments Time Limit: For standard plans: The plan must be cancelled within 3 hours of recharge For International Roaming or ISD Plans: The plan must be cancelled within 2 hours of recharge. However, if the plan is in "Upcoming" status, then it can be cancelled within 30 days of recharge Exclusions: This service is not applicable to Corporate or Enterprise segments Frequency Limits: You can use this feature once every 30 days (and a maximum of 3 times per calendar year) Recharged on a Wrong Jio Number? If you recharged the wrong Jio number, you must log in to that specific number's account to cancel the plan How to Cancel Your Recharge (Step-by-Step) Time is of the essence! For most standard plans, you must initiate this process within 3 hours of the successful recharge. Open the App: Open your MyJio App and log in Locate the Plan: Navigate to the "Recharges & History" section and follow the steps based on your account type: For Prepaid Users: Select Recharge History. Find the specific plan you wish to cancel and click on "View Details." For Postpaid Users (Pre-on-Post Recharges): Select Invoice History, then tap on "Recharge Transaction History." Locate the relevant plan and click on "View Details." Find the Cancel option: Look for the "Cancel" option on the next page. Check for Eligibility & Troubleshooting: Tap on the "Cancel Plan" option. If the "Cancel" option is NOT reflecting: The option may take up to 30 minutes to appear. Please refresh the app. If it still doesn't appear, log in to Jio.com to check. Remember: You must complete this within the 3-hour window. However, if you are still within the 3-hour window and cannot see the option in the app, please immediately log in to Jio.com via a browser and attempt to initiate the cancellation from there If you see an Error Message after clicking Cancel: This indicates that the plan is no longer eligible to be cancelled (either the time limit has passed, or usage was detected) Select Your Refund Method: If eligible, you will be asked to choose how you want your money back: Option A (Fastest): Instant reversal to your MyJio Store Credit wallet. This is immediate and can be used for your next correct recharge Option B: Refund to the original payment method (UPI, Bank, or Card). Note: It may take up to 21 business days for the funds to appear in your account Confirm & Notify: Once confirmed, you will receive a notification that the transaction is cancelled Track Your Refund: You can track the status of the recharge later by visiting the same page and clicking "Refund Status." Recommendation: Once the reversal is initiated, we advise you to immediately recharge with the correct plan to continue enjoying uninterrupted services. Note: The MyJio Store Credit is a digital wallet designed for instant use on Jio services only. It cannot be transferred back to a bank account or withdrawn as cash. If clicking "Cancel" results in a "Request Failed" or other error, it means the plan is no longer eligible for cancellation due to system checks—typically because the allowed cancellation window has passed or usage has already been detected.

question: How does a Jio Matching Number work?
answer: Jio Matching Number helps you own a number similar to your current one. To book a matching number, you have to go through a step where you choose your new number from all the available similar numbers. Here’s how it works: - When you go to the matching number link, you need to enter your current mobile number, and in case a non-Jio number, we need your PIN code to check the availability of matching numbers in your area. - We’ll show you matching mobile number options based on patterns like repeats or sequences. Pick the one you like - your chosen number will be reserved just for you. - Quickly book the number. As thousands of matching numbers are picked every day, we’re not sure if it will be available the next time you try. - After that, your SIM will be delivered and activated through our standard SIM activation process. You can also choose to activate your number via self-KYC by completing the KYC process online.

question: Why choose a Jio Matching Number?
answer: A Jio Matching Number makes it easy to personalise your mobile connection and build a shared identity with your loved ones. Whether its family members, couples, or close friends, matching numbers help you stay connected with a sense of familiarity and belonging. With a matching number, you can: - Create similar or sequential mobile numbers for your family or group - Choose a number that you feel matches most and therefore would be easy to remember - Enjoy better recall, making your number easier to remember and share - Add a personal touch to your Jio connection - Strengthen your family or group identity with numbers that feel connected A matching number is perfect for families, couples, and anyone who values simplicity, convenience, and personalisation in their mobile experience.

question: What is Safe Custody & how can I activate it?
answer: Safe Custody allows Postpaid customers to temporarily suspend their Jio connection for up to 90 days when it is not in use, at a minimal charge of ₹150. During this period, your services are paused and automatically restored after 90 days. Steps to activate Safe Custody via Jio.com: Log in to www.jio.com using the Jio number for which you want to activate Safe Custody. Click to login Go to Settings > Service Settings and select Safe Custody Choose the pause date and submit your request You will receive a confirmation message once Safe Custody is successfully activated. Your Jio number will be automatically reactivated after 90 days. Note: If a prepaid plan is recharged on a Postpaid number, all prepaid benefits will be forfeited once Safe Custody is activated Safe Custody is not applicable for prepaid connections
